notes: v2.5.6 - Quality management is now unified: Non-Conformance, CAPA and Risk live on a single AS9100 Quality page, and Risk Assessment is rebuilt on the AS9100-standard FMEA/RPN method - risks are scored on Severity x Detection x Frequency into a Risk Priority Number with automatic priority bands, a guided form (badge scan, attachments), a risk register, owner notifications and escalation to CAPA; your existing risks were carried forward. Purchasing can look up requisitions and POs on closed projects again via a new Show closed projects toggle (on by default). The Workforce Planner could-not-save-windows error is fixed, and a new one-click Diagnostics export produces a multi-sheet Excel workbook cataloging capacity, cascaded demand and actual hours by department, build/MTF and project, with an automatic Flags and Root Cause sheet explaining under-reported hours, mis-bucketed builds and impossible demand.
